## Page 68 — Logical Reasoning

**1.** Find the next number in the series: 2, 6, 12, 20, 30, ?

(A) 38
(B) 40
(C) 42
(D) 44

**2.** If CAT is coded as FDW, how is DOG coded?

(A) GRJ
(B) GRK
(C) HRJ
(D) GQJ

**3.** Six people — Priya, Rahul, Samir, Tina, Uma, and Vijay — are sitting in a circle facing the centre. Priya sits between Vijay and Uma. Rahul sits between Samir and Tina. Uma sits opposite Rahul. Who sits opposite Vijay?

(A) Priya
(B) Samir
(C) Tina
(D) Rahul

**4.** All roses are flowers. Some flowers fade quickly. Which conclusion follows?

(A) All roses fade quickly
(B) Some roses fade quickly
(C) No roses fade quickly
(D) None of the above definitely follows

**5.** Which of the following does NOT belong in the group?

Circle, Square, Sphere, Triangle, Rectangle

(A) Circle
(B) Sphere
(C) Triangle
(D) Rectangle

**6.** In a certain code: MANGO is written as OCPIQ. How is GRAPE written?

(A) ITCQG
(B) ITCRG
(C) ISCQG
(D) JTCQG
